title: Tales of Paris
director: Marc Allégret, Claude Barma, Michel Boisrond
writer: Jean-Loup Dabadie, Annette Wademant, Jacques Armand
actors: Françoise Arnoul, Françoise Brion, Catherine Deneuve
plot: The omnibus made of four separate romantic playlets, each with its own cast, director, and scenarist. "The Tale of Ella," directed by Jacques Poitrenaud, stars Dany Saval as an ambitious nightclub performer who very nearly messes ...
